scenario_name: Start from search or artifact not modeling
Built-in universal ontology seed is available
Generate a complete suggestion set from evidence
Object suggestions are explainable
Property suggestions are explainable
Link suggestions are explainable
Suggestions expose evidence gaps and uncertainty
User can review select reject or defer suggestions
Unpromoted suggestions cannot become ontology truth
Promotion is explicit and user-controlled
Promotion creates a versioned ontology change set
SemVer bump is meaningful
Promoted objects have stable identity and source mapping
Conflicts are visible not silently overwritten
Promoted object profile is usable
Search integrates promoted objects
Artifact Viewer shows extracted/promoted context
Claims can reference promoted ontology context but still require evidence
Actions can show ontology impact without external writeback
Audit timeline covers the full ontology lifecycle
User can undo or supersede by versioned correction
Multi-domain evidence works with the same core
Drop/Search remains first value
Prompt-injection content cannot promote ontology
LLM output is not ontology truth
Cross-namespace promotion is denied
Unsupported or low-confidence candidates stay draft
Duplicate and merge rules do not erase evidence
Existing VS-0 gates remain green
Production and live-provider claims remain out of scope
Ontology suggestions do not replace Evidence Bundles
Helpful failure for invalid ontology graph

required_human_action: JiYong/Tars uses VS-1 UI flow and records accept or reject.
expected_human_evidence: Acceptance note with screenshots/recording or issue list.

scenario_name: Domain meaning is reviewed by a human when semantic quality matters
required_human_action: Domain owner reviews labels relationships and object profiles.
expected_human_evidence: Domain review note with accepted/rejected labels and issues.
release_impact: Blocks domain-ready VS1 claim for that domain.

scenario_name: Production/live connector proof remains separate
human_required_reason: Live provider verification requires credentials approval and external state.
required_human_action: Human approves and runs live ConnectorHub/provider or production-data test.
expected_human_evidence: Redacted provider transcript approval result and audit refs.
